text:
わりとさくっとクリアしちゃってまあ……
燃え尽き症候群とか、そういう心配は
余計だったみたいね。

文句なし、問題もなし！
もーアンタはこのまま死なない程度に
突っ走りなさい！　私が許す！

あー、心配して損した……
……な、何でもないわよ！
それじゃ、ま

You breezed through that like it was nothing.
So much for worrying about you burning out.

No complaints lodged, no problems detected!
Keep rushing forward, as long as it's at a rate
that doesn't kill you, I guess! I permit it!

That's what I get for worrying, I guess... Huh?
Nothing! I didn't say anything! Laaater!
